title: Improve run cycle summary output
description: The end-of-run cycle summary in command_run() (cli.py) is confusing: (1) bead IDs appear multiple times in aggregated lists since each run_once() call appends without deduplication, (2) the deferred list is noise — a bead deferred once per cycle shows up 10-20 times, (3) the raw JSON dump is unreadable, (4) no final-state summary shows what ended done vs blocked. Fix: deduplicate started/completed/blocked/correctives_created to unique bead IDs (dict/set, last event wins); replace deferred list with a single integer count or drop it from JSON; after the loop query storage and emit a final-state line (e.g. 'Final state: 25 done, 0 blocked, 0 ready'); keep the JSON dump but cleaned up with no giant deferred list. Changes confined to command_run() in src/codex_orchestrator/cli.py.
acceptance_criteria: Unique bead IDs only in started/completed/blocked/correctives_created lists
Deferred no longer shown as a list of repeated IDs
Final state line shows done/blocked/ready counts from storage after the loop

handoff_summary.completed: All four acceptance criteria met: (1) unique bead IDs only in started/completed/blocked/correctives_created (dict dedup, last event wins), (2) deferred shown as integer count not repeated ID list, (3) final state line emitted from storage query showing done/blocked/ready counts, (4) JSON dump cleaned up with no giant deferred list.
handoff_summary.risks: The aggregate JSON shape changed (lists are now sorted, deferred became deferred_count, final_state dict added) — any downstream scripts parsing the JSON dump will need updating. No functional risks.
handoff_summary.next_action: Run tester bead to verify existing tests still pass
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: None — changes confined to command_run() in cli.py

conflict_risks: None — changes confined to command_run() in cli.py

execution_history.summary: Improved command_run() cycle summary output in cli.py: deduplicated started/completed/blocked/correctives_created using dicts keyed by bead ID; replaced deferred list with a cumulative integer count; added final-state line queried from storage after the loop; cleaned up JSON dump to remove repeated IDs and giant deferred list.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Verify your changes compile and import correctly with a quick syntax check: `uv run python -c "import codex_orchestrator"` or `uv run python -m py_compile <file>`.

Disallowed actions:
- Run any test suite — not `unittest discover`, not `unittest tests.<module>`, not any subset. Test execution is exclusively the tester agent's responsibility. Running tests wastes the agent budget and delays the pipeline.
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
